bead.title: Stage 3.8: NodeContext + ProjectContext stores + root redirect
bead.description: Create src/lib/stores/node.ts and src/lib/stores/project.ts as Svelte 5 runes stores. Create +layout.ts load function that loads { node { id name } } via Houdini. Create src/routes/+page.svelte that checks the store and redirects to /nodes/:nodeId. Create src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/+page.svelte that renders 'Node: <name> (<id>)' from the store. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 3 bead #34.
bead.acceptance: (1) MANUAL: load / in browser, URL becomes /nodes/node-xxxxxxxx, page shows the real node name from GraphQL. (2) Check browser devtools Network panel: confirm POST /graphql returned the expected `{ node { id name } }` shape. (3) Record the node ID seen in the completion note.
